entries.description: budgetBlockHtml gated on transportProfile (omit on copilot-cli); block nested as indented child of the Direct-API option row inside transportProfileBlockHtml; standalone render call removed; tree.css gs-option-child indent + separator-restore rules.

client.js: Build validates/posts budget riders only while Direct-API is selected (transportProfile rider always rides Full); gettingStartedActions.ts: asBudgetChoice drops rider on copilot-cli, fail-closed reject scoped to Full+api; gitScaffold.ts: effectiveBudget caller condition (copilot-cli passes no budget to the scaffold step; writeBudgetYaml unchanged); runScaffold seam carries the effective budget for Layer-2 observability.

New Layer-2 suites: placement/visibility (Full+api nested under the api row; Full+copilot omitted incl. no empty child wrapper; Lightweight absent), persistence (typed value + zero-rule pick survive api->copilot->api flip), Build matrix (api+budget threads budget; copilot-cli drops it), action-router matrix (Full+copilot dispatches budgetless; Full+api stays fail-closed). No semantic edits to pre-existing budget parsing / zero-rule / no-clobber tests.
routed_gate verdict REQUIRED (breadth: 8 files >= 4) -> cross-provider session-verification will run.
tsc --noEmit clean; Layer-2 mocha 1265 passing / 0 failing; Layer-3 Playwright 19/19 passed locally (L-064-12 — Explorer-rendering surface touched).

Cross-provider session-verification (gpt-5-4): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (one Major, S081-S1-V1-001 evidence-packet gap: path-filtered diff omitted the tracked session-state.json boundary write); R2 narrow re-verify with the complete unfiltered diff -> RESOLVED, no other conclusion changed; R3 wording-only restatement (max_tier pinned, L-064-7) -> VERIFIED. Raw outputs saved, never edited; structured finding in s1-issues.json.

Authored 081-budget-input-scoped-to-direct-api-uat-checklist.json to the Set 078/079/080 bar: 5 walks (placement Full+api incl. one judgment item; absence on Full+copilot and Lightweight; persistence across flip round-trip + window reload; one REAL cold-start Build per sub-option asserting the budget.yaml write matrix, L-079-3). Every quoted string re-grounded against current source; fresh suite counts quoted per walk (Set 081 S1 grep 12/12, build matrix 7/7, restoreGsState 26/26, writeBudgetYaml 3/3, full Layer-2 1265/0, tsc clean). Ad-hoc mechanical floor validated: every non-judgment functional item carries ProgrammaticVerification. Local VSIX packaged for the walk (dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.36.0.vsix, contains Set 081 S1 changes). Session paused for the operator walk.

Operator walk complete: all 6 functional/judgment items PASS across the 5 walks (both cold-start Builds included). One Other finding (Walk 4): the Build project structure button reads as belonging to the last sub-option row; wants a divider between the group and the button. Remediated CSS-only per simplicity-first: one tree.css rule closes BOTH sub-choice groups (.gs-transport-profile, .gs-verification-mode { border-bottom + margin-bottom }) -- the Lightweight verification group is the same class of issue (L-069-1). Gates re-run: Layer-2 1265/0, tsc clean, Layer-3 Playwright 18 passed + 1 flake (blocked-by-prereqs triggerRefresh timing; passes 4/4 in isolation -- not a regression, spec is unrelated to the form). VSIX rebuilt for the operator divider re-check.

Advisory end-of-set path-aware critique produced via python -m ai_router.pull_critique (first-party producer; default provider pair openai:gpt-5.4 + google:gemini-2.5-pro; sandbox = repo root; --diff-base bba3826 exposing the whole set diff). BOTH arms VERIFIED with zero findings; artifact saved raw to path-aware-critique.json (level advisory, matching the recorded set-start policy).
Operator captured refreshed getting-started.png against the rebuilt candidate VSIX (budget block nested under the Direct-API row + the new group-closing divider).

routed_gate verdict REQUIRED (blast-radius cross-artifact+index; multi-module docs+tools; breadth 10 files >= 4; build-ci-config package.json + package-lock.json) -> cross-provider session-verification ran.

Cross-provider session-verification (gpt-5-4): VERIFIED round 1, no blocking findings; two non-blocking NITS (lockfile-version prose slip; checklist-inline remediation note, appended post-verdict with attribution). Raw output s2-verification.md, never edited. Evidence: complete unfiltered diff + git status (L-064-9), no dist/ bundle.

Release prep: extension 0.36.0 -> 0.37.0 (npm version; realigned the drifted 0.34.0 lockfile), CHANGELOG 0.37.0 entry, repository-reference status row + version walk (honest publish-pending phrasing per L-078-1). Lessons cited via cite_lessons --set 81. Tag push preauthorized by the operator; publish details flip in the final close-out commit. PUBLISHED: Test run 28764463565 green on bc3b43f; tag vsix-v0.37.0 pushed (operator-preauthorized); publish-vscode.yml run 28764677942 success; repository-reference + change-log flipped to Published.
